summary: Completed comprehensive testing of flexible parser for V85 Travanalys app. Parser successfully handles both standard format and ATG format with automatic format detection. All error handling scenarios work correctly.
passed_tests: Standard format parsing with sample data
ATG format parsing with race.starts structure
Race info extraction from ATG format (race.name, race.track.name)
Horse data extraction from race.starts array
Error handling for missing odds/betDistribution fields
Console warning messages for skipped horses
Unknown format detection and error messaging
Consistent results regardless of input format
